assertions.description: Output includes a visual anchor string and one distinct prompt per image with no two images sharing the same composition type
Each image has a content note specifying when/how to post it in a content calendar
A Next Step note recommends which image to generate first and whether to check grid layout

assertion_results.note: Anchor string plus 6 prompts with varied compositions (close/medium/wide)
Each image has specific posting day and caption direction
Next Step recommends generating Image 3 first; notes Instagram grid check
Anchor string plus 5 prompts with composition variety
Content notes suggest weekly posting schedule
Next Step provides generation order recommendation
Anchor string for industrial European aesthetic plus 7 prompts
Each image maps to specific day in two-week LinkedIn campaign
Next Step addresses LinkedIn grid considerations and first-image recommendation

methodology: Binary assertion testing: 3 inputs (standard, minimal, European context) x 3 assertions per skill. Each assertion graded pass/fail based on whether generated output satisfies the requirement.
